programme.desc: Hen fears for Karen's life when an explosion rocks her science lab on the day she brings Denny to work with her.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: Athena and the 118 race to the rescue when a fading movie star is plagued by a series of near-death experiences.

programme.desc: The 118 race to the rescue to a renaissance faire; an overbearing boss is poisoned; Athena fears for May's life when she encounters a disturbed young man; Uncle Buck babysits young Jee-Yun as Maddie and Chimney begin house-hunting.

programme.desc: The Santa Ana winds bring in a variety of weirder-than-usual emergencies; a family dog retrieves a severed hand; a young woman sleep-drives into the station; Denny questions Hen and Karen about his biological parents.

programme.desc: A dry thunderstorm rolls over Los Angeles, bringing in a series of lightning strike emergencies for the 118 and leaves a first responder's life hanging in the balance; Chimney get a surprise from a visiting Albert.

programme.desc: As Buck's life hangs in the balance, he dreams of a world where he never became a firefighter, for better and worse.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie's residency gets off to a rocky start as Cal shows Ben the ropes at the Crossing and begins to wonder if Liam has any intention of leaving.

programme.desc: Despite the case being closed, Bobby is determined to prove his Alcoholics Anonymous sponsor was murdered and bring his killer to justice; Buck struggles with his post-traumatic stress.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A former police chief gets into constant conflicts with a young renter who doesn't respect his authority; the war between them intensifies until blood flows down their street.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: An abandoned suitcase containing a young woman's body, leads to a mystery of a second woman missing too.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One races to catch a disturbed and armed man on a ferry.

programme.desc: A former police chief gets into constant conflicts with a young renter who doesn't respect his authority; the war between them intensifies until blood flows down their street.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead is backed into a corner after unknowingly making a deal with a gangster; Manning fights for her dying patient, who is not a U.S. citizen; Rhodes and Bekker clash in the OR; Choi is shocked when he meets Emily's new boyfriend.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead's first task as a criminal informant puts a strain on his relationship with Manning; Choi is shocked when the father of Emily's child ends up in the ED; Rhodes presses Bekker to reveal who anonymously donated funds for his satellite OR.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Manning and Halstead must act fast to save the life of a physically abused wife; Choi and April are shocked to learn the truth about their 14-year-old cirrhosis patient; Rhodes and Lanik go head-to-head in the ER.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: After a deadly chemical spill, the ED goes on lockdown, threatening the lives of several patients and leaving one of Med's own hanging in the balance; Rhodes and Manning must perform lifesaving surgeries.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Choi and Charles use trickery to help a patient with an itch she can't help but scratch; Halstead and Manning argue over a tattooed coma patient; Rhodes angers Goodwin by going against orders to save a patient in the hybrid OR.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead and Manning's wedding day is interrupted when Halstead is forced to make a house call; Charles treats a woman who stabbed her husband; Choi and April deliver a breech baby; Rhodes and Bekker operate on an FBI witness.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: A shooting outside the hospital injures April and leaves the ED shaken up; Halstead returns after a stint in the witness relocation program; Charles and Elsa have an emotional confrontation; Bekker is reluctant to attend an event honoring Rhodes.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: When an attempted armed robbery ends in murder, U.K. detectives must connect the dots between hours of surveillance video.

programme.title: Crime Scene Investigators
programme.desc: When an attempted armed robbery ends in murder, U.K. detectives must connect the dots between hours of surveillance video.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: The murder of a gay couple in rural California leads investigators into the world of hate crimes.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A series of bombs tears the city apart, as Team One attempts high-risk rescues.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Complaints about dogs running loose lead to the construction of a fence between two long-time neighbors, but the problem isn't solved and flaring tempers lead to fist fights, stabbings, and ultimately a shocking shootout captured on video.
